query:
SELECT p.id, p.numero, p.tipo, p.valor, p.totalMedicoes, p.dataInicio, p.status, p.responsavel,
       p.createdAt,
       (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(m.mes ORDER BY m.mes) FROM medicoes m WHERE m.pedidoId = p.id) AS mesesComMedicao
FROM pedidos p
WHERE p.numero = '4500813752';
